name: LockBit
notes: Most-prolific RaaS; repeated US healthcare victims through 2024 despite Op Cronos disruption.

name: ALPHV / BlackCat
notes: Hit Change Healthcare / UnitedHealth (Feb 2024) — largest US healthcare data breach to date.

name: Cl0p
notes: MOVEit, GoAnywhere, Accellion mass-exfil campaigns include HHS / state Medicaid victims.

name: Black Basta
notes: Ascension Health attack (May 2024); CISA / HC3 joint advisory specifically calling out healthcare targeting.

name: Akira
notes: Frequent mid-size healthcare and education victims; double-extortion.

name: Rhysida
notes: Lurie Children's, Prospect Medical, multiple US hospital systems; HC3 sector alert.

name: Royal / DEV-0569
notes: Conti-rebrand lineage; CISA #StopRansomware joint advisory citing healthcare victims.

name: Play
notes: CISA advisory; opportunistic healthcare hits.

name: Medusa
notes: Distinct from Medusa botnet/Mirai; CISA #StopRansomware advisory March 2025.

name: BianLian
notes: Pivoted to extortion-only; AHA / FBI advisories cite healthcare focus.

name: Hunters International
notes: Inherited Hive infrastructure; healthcare among targeted sectors.

name: Qilin / Agenda
notes: Synnovis / UK NHS pathology attack June 2024; demonstrated capacity against health labs.

name: RansomHub
notes: Absorbed ALPHV affiliates after Change Healthcare exit-scam; CISA #StopRansomware advisory.

name: INC Ransom
notes: Cropped up 2023; healthcare and government victims; possible Lynx rebrand.

name: Trinity
notes: HC3 sector alert specifically citing US healthcare targeting; possible 2023Lock / Venus overlap.

name: APT41
notes: Heavy biomed / pharma IP-theft; mixes state-aligned espionage with financial ops.

name: Mustang Panda
notes: Government / NGO / think-tank focus; PlugX / Korplug; recent FBI Aug 2024 takedown.

name: Volt Typhoon
notes: US critical-infrastructure pre-positioning; healthcare considered in scope per CISA.

name: APT29 / Cozy Bear
notes: Targeted COVID-19 vaccine research orgs (NCSC/NSA 2020); SolarWinds; Microsoft 365 corp tenants.

name: Sandworm
notes: ICS-capable wiper ops; healthcare facility OT exposure.

name: APT28 / Fancy Bear
notes: Government / political; secondary healthcare via federal targeting.

name: Kimsuky
notes: Targeted COVID-19 / biomedical research orgs; academic and policy think-tanks.

name: Lazarus Group
notes: Supply-chain attacks (3CX, JumpCloud); occasional healthcare via downstream MSP compromise.

name: Andariel
notes: CISA/FBI/NSA advisory July 2024 explicitly calling out US healthcare and biomedical research.

name: APT35 / Mint Sandstorm
notes: COVID-19 research targeting (Microsoft 2020); academic / journalist / think-tank focus.

name: MuddyWater / Mango Sandstorm
notes: Government and telecom focus; healthcare via shared Middle East/US targeting overlap.

name: Cobalt Mirage / Lemon Sandstorm
notes: Hit US local government and academic targets; ransomware-as-disruption (BitLocker abuse).

name: Scattered Spider / UNC3944
notes: Social-engineering helpdesks for SaaS access; recent healthcare and insurance victims.

name: FIN7
notes: Pivoted to ransomware affiliate work; toolkit appears in healthcare intrusions.

name: FIN12
notes: 20%+ of victims are healthcare per Mandiant; deploys Ryuk / Conti / Nokoyawa.

name: TA505
notes: Cl0p operator; banker / loader / IAB; healthcare via mass-exfil campaigns.

name: Anonymous Sudan
notes: DDoS against US gov / hospitals; FBI indictment Oct 2024 named Sudanese operators.

name: Killnet
notes: DDoS against US hospitals (Jan 2023 wave) and federal sites; HC3 specific alert.

name: Handala
notes: Wiper attack on Stryker (medtech) reported 2026; Israel / US healthcare targeting pattern.

name: NoName057(16)
notes: DDoSia project; opportunistic gov + sector-aligned with Russia geopolitical posture.
